ALL PROCEEDINGS IN THIS CASE ARE STAYED OTHER THAN THE PROCEEDINGS PERTAINING TO THE PENDING COORDINATION PETITION UNTIL THE RESOLUTION OF THE COORDINATION PETITION OR FURTHER COURT ORDER. RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Dynamic Ledger Solutions, Inc.'s motion to stay all proceedings is granted in small part. All proceedings in this case are stayed other than the proceedings pertaining to the pending coordination petition until the resolution of the coordination petition or further court order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
